name: writing-quality
description: AI writing pattern detection and 5-dimension quality scoring. Deterministic checks for banned phrases/structures + LLM scoring for voice, rhythm, authenticity. Sources: humanizer (29 patterns) + stop-slop (5-dim scoring).

tools.name: check_writing_quality
tools.description: Score content on 5 dimensions (Directness, Rhythm, Trust, Authenticity, Density) and detect AI writing patterns. Returns structured findings with pass/fail verdict at 35/50 threshold. Uses deterministic pattern matching for banned phrases/structures, LLM for judgment-based scoring.

context.description: Optional brand context (voice rules, audience, constraints)

mode.description: Audit mode: full (patterns + scoring), patterns-only (deterministic only, no LLM), score-only (LLM scoring only). Default: full.
